dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3375 IS: Native Arts and Culture Promotion Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Schatz (for himself, Ms. Hirono, and Ms. Murkowski) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Indian Affairs

form.official-title: To amend the American Indian, Alaska Native, and Native Hawaiian Culture and Art Development Act to modify the program for Native Hawaiian and Alaska Native culture and arts development, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Native Arts and Culture Promotion Act.

section.header: Amendments to American Indian, Alaska Native, and Native Hawaiian Culture and Art Development Act
section.text: Section 1521 of the American Indian, Alaska Native, and Native Hawaiian Culture and Art Development Act (20 U.S.C. 4441) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subsection (a), in the matter preceding paragraph (1), by striking private,;
in subsection (b), in each of paragraphs (2) and (3), by inserting and maintain after establish; and

subparagraph.text: by striking paragraph (2) and inserting the following:

paragraph.text: For any grants made with respect to Native Hawaiian art and culture, the members of the governing board which is required to be established under paragraph (1) shall—

subparagraph.text: include Native Hawaiians and individuals widely recognized in the field of Native Hawaiian art and culture; and

clause.text: in subparagraph (A), by striking the comma at the end and inserting ; and;
